title: The State of Arunachal Pradesh Act, 1986
full_text: The State of Arunachal Pradesh Act, 1986 अरुणाचल प्रदेश राज्य अधिनियम, 1986 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198669 Act Number: 69 Enactment Date: 1986-12-24 Act Year: 1986 Short Title: The State of Arunachal Pradesh Act, 1986 Hindi Title: अरुणाचल प्रदेश राज्य अधिनियम, 1986 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of the State of Arunachal Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 20-02-1987 Notification: 20th February, 1987, vide notification No. S.O. 74(E), dated 11th February, 1987, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. THE THIRD SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4.
